characters.appearance: Male, mid-20s, slim build, fair complexion. He has wavy, medium-length brown hair and a prominent mustache. His facial features are expressive.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Myself... [Myself...]
Character A says: I am... [I am...]
Character A says: My name is... [My name is...]
Character A says: I am... [I am...]
Character A says: Hi, I am... [Hi, I am...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable struggle of practicing English introductions and hesitating.
- Establishes the core problem of lacking confidence while speaking.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution to overcome this hesitation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलने में अटकते हो?
Supernova is here to build your confidence
I am...
Myself...?

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: हमने English learning को boring grammar से निकालकर real-world practice बना दिया है। [We took English learning out of boring grammar and turned it into real-world practice.]
Unknown speaker says: AI tutor के साथ रोज़ बात करो, बिना किसी डर के। [Talk daily with an AI tutor, without any fear.]
Unknown speaker says: Interview हो या office meeting, अब हर जगह confidence से बोलो। [Whether it's an interview or an office meeting, now speak with confidence everywhere.]
Unknown speaker says: सिर्फ videos देखने में time waste मत करो, आज ही सही English बोलना शुरू करो। [Don't waste time just watching videos, start speaking correct English today.]
Unknown speaker says: Start today. [Start today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights Supernova's core features: AI tutor and real-world conversation practice.
- Shifts the focus from passive learning (watching videos/grammar) to active, confident speaking.
- Delivers a warm, encouraging call-to-action to download the app and start practicing.
